proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `stage_iv` equal to 0 after adjustment for age, ECOG performance status, metastatic sites, tumor burden, albumin, LDH, weight loss, Ki-67, and tumor size.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ stage_iv + age_years + ecog_ps + has_brain_mets + liver_mets + bone_mets + node_positive + albumin_g_dl + ldh_u_l + weight_loss_pct_6mo + ki67_pct + tumor_size_cm
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated `stage_iv` = 1 at -1.551 months of PFS versus `stage_iv` = 0.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment for stage, age, metastatic sites, tumor burden, albumin, LDH, weight loss, Ki-67, and tumor size.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ ecog_ps + clinical covariates excluding ecog_ps
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -1.166 months of PFS per one-point increase in `ecog_ps`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `has_brain_mets` equal to 0 after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ has_brain_mets + clinical covariates excluding has_brain_mets
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated `has_brain_mets` = 1 at -0.993 months of PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `pfs_months` after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ albumin_g_dl + clinical covariates excluding albumin_g_dl
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated +0.484 months of PFS per 1 g/dL higher `albumin_g_dl`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ weight_loss_pct_6mo + clinical covariates excluding weight_loss_pct_6mo
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.077 months of PFS per one percentage point higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ki67_pct` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ ki67_pct + clinical covariates excluding ki67_pct
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.019 months of PFS per one percentage point higher `ki67_pct`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ldh_u_l` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ ldh_u_l + clinical covariates excluding ldh_u_l
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated a small negative association for `ldh_u_l`: -0.001 months per U/L.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Larger `tumor_size_cm` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ tumor_size_cm + clinical covariates excluding tumor_size_cm
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated -0.002 months per cm for `tumor_size_cm`, which was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `er_positive` equal to 0 after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ er_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated `er_positive` = 1 at +0.547 months of PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_positive` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `her2_positive` equal to 0 after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ her2_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated `her2_positive` = 1 at -0.468 months of PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 1 have lower `pfs_months` than patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 0 after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ pik3ca_mutation + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated `pik3ca_mutation` = 1 at -0.587 months of PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pr_positive` equal to 1 have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `pr_positive` equal to 0 after adjustment for `er_positive` and clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ pr_positive + er_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: After adding `er_positive`, `pr_positive` had only +0.017 months of adjusted PFS and was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_low` equal to 1 have higher `pfs_months` than patients with `her2_low` equal to 0 after adjustment for `her2_positive` and clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ her2_low + her2_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: `her2_low` had +0.005 months of adjusted PFS after accounting for `her2_positive`, which was not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_palbociclib` have higher `pfs_months` than patients not receiving `treatment_palbociclib` after adjustment for clinical covariates.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS estimated `treatment_palbociclib` at +1.102 months of PFS.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `er_positive` equal to 1 than in patients with `er_positive` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + er_positive + treatment_palbociclib:er_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_palbociclib` by `er_positive` interaction was +1.574 months, supporting larger palbociclib benefit in ER-positive patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 1 than in patients with `pik3ca_mutation` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + pik3ca_mutation + treatment_palbociclib:pik3ca_mutation + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_palbociclib` by `pik3ca_mutation` interaction was -1.678 months, indicating strong attenuation in PIK3CA-mutant patients.

analyses.code: Subgroup mean difference in pfs_months among pik3ca_mutation == 1
analyses.result_summary: Within the `pik3ca_mutation` = 1 subgroup, unadjusted palbociclib-treated patients had only +0.036 months PFS versus untreated patients, not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with high `ki67_pct` than in patients with lower `ki67_pct`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + high_ki67 + treatment_palbociclib:high_ki67 + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: Using the upper quartile of `ki67_pct` to define high Ki-67, the palbociclib by high-Ki-67 interaction was -1.471 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `her2_positive` equal to 1 than in patients with `her2_positive` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + her2_positive + treatment_palbociclib:her2_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_palbociclib` by `her2_positive` interaction was -1.346 months, indicating less palbociclib-associated PFS in HER2-positive disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_palbociclib` and `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `pr_positive` equal to 1 than in patients with `pr_positive` equal to 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + pr_positive + treatment_palbociclib:pr_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_palbociclib` by `pr_positive` interaction was +1.036 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: In a simultaneous interaction model, `treatment_palbociclib` remains more positively associated with `pfs_months` in `er_positive` disease and less positively associated with `pfs_months` in `pik3ca_mutation`, `her2_positive`, and high-`ki67_pct` disease.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib*(er_positive + pik3ca_mutation + her2_positive + high_ki67) + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: Simultaneous model: palbociclib by `er_positive` interaction remained positive at +1.532 months.

analyses.code: same simultaneous interaction model
analyses.result_summary: Simultaneous model: palbociclib by `pik3ca_mutation` interaction remained negative at -1.645 months.

analyses.code: same simultaneous interaction model
analyses.result_summary: Simultaneous model: palbociclib by `her2_positive` interaction remained negative at -1.315 months.

analyses.code: same simultaneous interaction model
analyses.result_summary: Simultaneous model: palbociclib by high `ki67_pct` interaction remained negative at -1.455 months.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_tamoxifen` is associated with higher `pfs_months` specifically in patients with `er_positive` equal to 1.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_tamoxifen + er_positive + treatment_tamoxifen:er_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_tamoxifen` by `er_positive` interaction was -0.002 months and not significant.

analyses.code: Subgroup mean difference in pfs_months among er_positive == 1
analyses.result_summary: Within the `er_positive` = 1 subgroup, tamoxifen-treated patients had +0.023 months PFS versus untreated patients, not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_trastuzumab` is associated with higher `pfs_months` in patients with `her2_positive` equal to 1 or `her2_amplification` equal to 1.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab + her2_positive + treatment_trastuzumab:her2_positive + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_trastuzumab` by `her2_positive` interaction was +0.015 months and not significant.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_trastuzumab + her2_amplification + treatment_trastuzumab:her2_amplification + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_trastuzumab` by `her2_amplification` interaction was -0.095 months and not significant.

analyses.code: Subgroup mean difference in pfs_months among her2_positive == 1
analyses.result_summary: Within `her2_positive` = 1 patients, trastuzumab-treated patients had -0.079 months PFS versus untreated patients, not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_olaparib` is associated with higher `pfs_months` in patients with `brca1_mutation` equal to 1 or `brca2_mutation` equal to 1.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib + brca1_mutation + treatment_olaparib:brca1_mutation + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_olaparib` by `brca1_mutation` interaction was +0.153 months and not significant.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_olaparib + brca2_mutation + treatment_olaparib:brca2_mutation + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The `treatment_olaparib` by `brca2_mutation` interaction was -0.036 months and not significant.

analyses.code: Subgroup mean difference in pfs_months among brca1_mutation == 1
analyses.result_summary: Within `brca1_mutation` = 1 patients, olaparib-treated patients had +0.398 months PFS versus untreated patients, not significant.

analyses.code: Subgroup mean difference in pfs_months among brca2_mutation == 1
analyses.result_summary: Within `brca2_mutation` = 1 patients, olaparib-treated patients had +0.295 months PFS versus untreated patients, not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` is associated with higher `pfs_months` in `her2_low` disease and in triple-negative disease defined by `er_positive` = 0, `pr_positive` = 0, and `her2_positive` = 0.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan + her2_low + treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:her2_low + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The sacituzumab by `her2_low` interaction was +0.024 months and not significant.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan + tnbc + treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:tnbc + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The sacituzumab by triple-negative interaction was -0.025 months and not significant.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan + tnbc_her2_low + treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan:tnbc_her2_low + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The sacituzumab by HER2-low triple-negative interaction was -0.033 months and not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `treatment_pembrolizumab` is associated with lower `pfs_months` in patients with `autoimmune_disease` equal to 1 than in patients with `autoimmune_disease` equal to 0.
`treatment_pembrolizumab` is associated with lower `pfs_months` in patients with high `nlr` than in patients with lower `nlr`.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + autoimmune_disease + treatment_pembrolizumab:autoimmune_disease + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: The pembrolizumab by `autoimmune_disease` interaction was -0.008 months and not significant.

analyses.code: OLS: pfs_months ~ treatment_pembrolizumab + high_nlr + treatment_pembrolizumab:high_nlr + clinical covariates
analyses.result_summary: Using the upper quartile to define high `nlr`, the pembrolizumab by high-NLR interaction was -0.067 months and did not reach significance.
